COVID-19 Resources Chelation Therapy Chelation is a therapy that is used to improve the circulatory functions of the body by removing the toxic metals and abnormally placed nutritional metallic ions through urinary output. Request  an appointment > Ozone Therapy Ozone therapy is a treatment in which pure, medical grade Ozone is added in the body to increase the amount of Oxygen in the body. The therapy aims to utilize ozone for regenerative purposes. Request  an appointment > Cartography Cardiovascular Cartography is a modern advanced technology for the assessment of blood vessels and cardiovascular functions. This non-invasive, 3D diagnostic method is used to detect coronary Request  an appointment > About Us Before Therapy Receive expert consultation to tailor a personalized healing plan based on your mental, physical, and emotional well-being. Post-Therapy Benefit from lifestyle and wellness guidance to manage and prevent recurring conditions like diabetes and hypertension. About Us VHCC believes in Non-Invasive Procedures At VHCC, we offer non-invasive treatments for conditions like gangrene, arthritis, and diabetic wounds—no cuts, no tissue removal, and zero side effects. Feeling Healthy Our busy lives take a toll, leading to hypertension, diabetes, and stress. VHCC helps restore health by eliminating impurities and promoting long-term wellness. Detoxifying Body We accumulate toxins from the environment, leading to early aging. VHCC’s holistic approach helps detoxify the body, allowing it to regenerate and function optimally. Rejuvenating Heart VHCC focuses on heart health, offering preventive care and advanced diagnostics to improve overall health, boost immunity, and reduce inflammation.
